narrative:
Beavercreek 013 (precinct in Greene County) has 689 registered voters, with 50.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.2 percentage points.
